factors.factor: Digital Maturity 82 — 100% of inflow and outflow is digital, zero cash withdrawals
Commitment Index 38 — no SIP, insurance, or rent detected in 2 months of history
Essential Stability 61 — telecom and groceries paid consistently despite irregular income
Income irregularity — 3 different gig-platform payout sources, no single employer
Positive net cashflow across both months tracked

narrative: Income comes from gig-platform payouts rather than a single employer, but spending stays disciplined and fully digital — the profile a salary-only score would miss entirely.
